Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hollyanne Gentile appeared by zoom for Reign Saballos-Fructuoso.
Emannuel Santos appeared by zoom for Maria Elena Garcia.

The court noted that there are procedural issues that need to be addressed. Mrs. Gentile stated that the petitioner is the granddaughter of the decedent and the daughter of Ed, that there is no registered domestic partner, and that there is a predeceased child, but that child had no issue. The court waives the requirement of re-notice and re-publication of the amended petition. Mr. Santos stated that he is not here to object. The court granted the Amended Petition for Letters of Administration. Reign Saballos-Fructuoso is appointed as the administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for March 3, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Jan-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
